close_reason: Decided: OpenGov requires its official Procurement API + credentials (both scraping paths Cloudflare-blocked). Gated on obtaining API access; no scraping route exists.
description: OpenGov (procurement.opengov.com) returns Cloudflare 403 to plain Req even with full Chrome headers. Options: (a) headless browser if it passes Cloudflare (see WAF-verify task), or (b) OpenGov's official Procurement API (needs API key / partner access). Investigate the API + whether creds are obtainable; otherwise rely on browser. Decide and document the per-source approach.

comments.text: DECISION (informed by gyl.3): both plain HTTP (Cloudflare 403, even with Chrome headers) and the headless browser (Cloudflare 'Just a moment' challenge) are blocked. Therefore OpenGov is NOT scannable via scraping. The only viable path is OpenGov's official Procurement API, which requires partner/API credentials. ACTION: pursue OpenGov API access (credentials) when OpenGov coverage is prioritized; until then OpenGov sources are out of scope for the scanner. No code change -- this is a coverage/credentials decision.

title: OpenGov coverage: browser vs official procurement API
